name: Toyota Yaris
description: Compact and fuel-efficient, the Toyota Yaris is perfect for city drives and quick getaways.

name: Alphard
description: The Alphard redefines luxury travel with its spacious cabin and premium automatic transmission.

name: Lexus NX - 300
description: Refined and powerful, the Lexus NX 300 combines luxury with versatile SUV capability.

name: Camry
description: Timeless and reliable, the Camry delivers a smooth, comfortable ride every single time.

name: Innova
description: A trusted family favourite, the Innova offers ample space and dependable performance.

name: Toyota Fortuner
description: Built for adventure, the Fortuner tackles tough terrain without sacrificing comfort.

name: Innova Zenix
description: The next-generation Innova Zenix blends MPV practicality with modern hybrid technology.

name: Terios
description: Compact yet capable, the Terios is an ideal choice for urban exploration and light off-road.

name: Honda CR-V
description: The CR-V offers a winning mix of space, efficiency, and refined driving dynamics.

name: Mercedes C-Class
description: Elegance meets performance — the C-Class is the definitive luxury sedan for discerning drivers.

name: BMW 3 Series
description: The ultimate driving machine — sporty, precise, and unmistakably BMW.

name: Toyota Land Cruiser
description: Legendary off-road capability meets first-class comfort in the iconic Land Cruiser.

name: Honda Civic
description: Sporty, stylish, and reliable — the Civic is a perennial favourite for everyday driving.

name: Kia Sportage
description: Modern styling and a feature-packed cabin make the Sportage a standout compact SUV.

name: Hyundai Tucson
description: Bold design and smart technology come together in the versatile Hyundai Tucson.

name: Nissan X-Trail
description: Family-friendly and adventure-ready, the X-Trail handles every road with ease.

name: Mitsubishi Pajero
description: A true off-road legend, the Pajero conquers any terrain with confidence and power.

name: Toyota Corolla
description: The world's best-selling car — dependable, comfortable, and always in style.

name: Volkswagen Golf
description: Refined engineering and everyday practicality make the Golf a timeless hatchback choice.

name: Audi Q5
description: Quattro all-wheel drive and a luxurious interior make the Q5 the premium SUV benchmark.
